ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mobile device */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand that manufactured the device */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device model */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device model variant */,
  "battery_power" INTEGER /* Battery power of the device in mAh */,
  "blue" INTEGER /* Bluetooth support (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "clock_speed" REAL /* Clock speed of the device in GHz */,
  "dual_sim" INTEGER /* Dual SIM capability (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "fc" INTEGER /* Front camera resolution in MP */,
  "four_g" INTEGER /* 4G connectivity support (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "int_memory" INTEGER /* Internal memory in GB */,
  "m_dep" REAL /* Mobile device dependency (e.g., dimensions) in meters */,
  "mobile_wt" INTEGER /* Mobile weight in grams */,
  "n_cores" INTEGER /* Number of processor cores */,
  "pc" INTEGER /* Physical cores */,
  "px_height" INTEGER /* Pixel height of the device display */,
  "px_width" INTEGER /* Pixel width of the device display */,
  "ram" INTEGER /* RAM in MB */,
  "sc_h" INTEGER /* Screen height in inches */,
  "sc_w" INTEGER /* Screen width in inches */,
  "talk_time" INTEGER /* Talk time in hours */,
  "three_g" INTEGER /* 3G connectivity support (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "touch_screen" INTEGER /* Touch screen capability (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "wifi" INTEGER /* Wi-Fi support (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "price_range_id" INTEGER /* Price range category (1, 2, or 3) */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system installed on the device */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system installed on the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES device_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES device_model_variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_price_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_range_id") REFERENCES price_ranges ("price_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_ranges" (
  "price_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price range */,
  "range_name" TEXT /* Name of the price range (e.g., Low, Mid, High) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the price range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand (e.g., Brand A, Brand B) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device model */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand that manufactured the device model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the device model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the device model was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_model_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device model variant */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device model */,
  "storage_capacity" INTEGER /* Storage capacity of the device model variant in GB */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the device model variant */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the device model variant (new or refurbished) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "overall_rating" REAL /* Overall rating given to the device (1-5) */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "review_helpful" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_reviews_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the image relates to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if it's a primary image for display (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_images_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, moderator, regular user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_history" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the purchase */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of purchase */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price paid for the device at the time of purchase */,
  "purchase_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the purchase (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "purchase_status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the specification belongs to */,
  "specification_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification (e.g., 'color', 'warranty') */,
  "specification_value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_specifications_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_model_variant_specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification entry */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device model variant the specification belongs to */,
  "specification_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification (e.g., 'display size', 'processor speed') */,
  "specification_value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_model_variant_specifications_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES device_model_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_reviews_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the rating belongs to */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating (e.g., 'display', 'performance') */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_reviews_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES device_reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_comparison" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comparison */,
  "device_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first device being compared */,
  "device_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second device being compared */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date the comparison was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_comparison_device_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("device_id1") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_comparison_device_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("device_id2") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_comparison_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
